hero.title: Sweida Sustainable Development Fund
hero.subtitle: A vision originating from people's daily needs, providing practical and sustainable solutions in water, energy, and services.

content.location_text: Sweida enjoys a unique strategic location on a volcanic plateau known as 'Jabal al-Arab', which has given it great geographical importance in facilitating trade and transport, providing a moderate climate and fertile lands suitable for agriculture.
content.vision_text1: We strive to improve water resources, electricity, and health and educational service projects through our non-profit sustainable development fund.
content.vision_text2: Our goal is to build an integrated developmental model that restores balance to the local economy, improves quality of life, and enhances social stability.
content.water_energy_text: There is no real development without stable water and reliable energy. We focus first on using solar energy to operate wells and pumps, and providing clean electricity for hospitals, homes, and the industrial sector.
content.sustainability_title: Dimensions of Sustainable Development in Sweida
sustainability_list: Better management of water and electricity resources.
Reliance on renewable energy (solar and wind).
Supporting and developing livestock and agricultural equipment.

header_title: Modern Electricity: The Secret of Connections
header_subtitle: Towards a sustainable future for Sweida Governorate
footer_msg: We are committed to transparency and periodic reporting to build a more stable and prosperous future for Sweida.

water.title: Water
water.desc: Providing sustainable water resources to ensure a better life for the people of Sweida.

nature.title: Environment
nature.desc: Protecting nature and increasing green spaces for a sustainable ecological balance.

creation.title: Production
creation.desc: Supporting innovation and small projects to boost the local economy.

about.hero_subtitle: Sweida Sustainable Development Fund: Building people, protecting land, and restoring hope.
about.location_title_main: Authenticity of Place and Depth of History
about.location_desc: Sweida enjoys a strategic location on the volcanic 'Jabal al-Arab' plateau, which provided it with a moderate climate and fertile land, making it a historic and commercial center through the ages.
about.vision_title: Our Vision: The Lifeblood Starts Here
about.vision_desc: We don't just install solar panels; we build an integrated energy system that combines sun and wind to power hospitals, schools, and water pumps efficiently.
about.pillars_subtitle: We work to integrate developmental dimensions to ensure a sustainable future.
about.eco_desc: Innovation in water management, developing mountain agriculture, and supporting small projects to create jobs.
about.env_desc: Protecting biodiversity and relying on renewable energy to face climate change.
about.soc_desc: Ensuring equity in access to health and educational services and reducing social gaps.
about.donor_desc: We are committed to absolute transparency and periodic reports that transform your contributions into a tangible impact on the ground.
about.blockchain_verify: Technologically verified for the highest integrity standards

projects_page.subtitle: Practical initiatives aimed at achieving self-sufficiency and protecting the mountain environment through innovative development solutions.
projects_page.project1_desc: Equipping major health centers in the governorate with smart solar systems to ensure the continuity of critical medical services.
projects_page.project2_desc: Developing pumping systems in artesian wells to ensure sustainable water access for all residential communities.
projects_page.project3_desc: Providing technical support and modern equipment to farmers to increase the quality and productivity of crops in Sweida.
projects_page.no_projects: No projects available at the moment.

slide1.title: Mountain Heritage
slide1.desc: We draw inspiration from our ancient history in Sweida to build a future that matches our authenticity.

slide2.title: Renewable Energy
slide2.desc: Towards complete energy independence relying on the natural resources of Jabal al-Arab.

slide3.title: Building People
slide3.desc: Investing in young talents and skills development is the cornerstone of our social renaissance.

slide4.title: Bounty of the Land
slide4.desc: Sweida's fertile basaltic soil is our source of pride and sustainable food security.

about_section.description: Sweida is not just a city; it is a solid volcanic plateau known as 'Jabal al-Arab'. This elevation gave it a defensive advantage and a moderate climate that made it a fertile food basket and a commercial center connecting caravans through the ages.

water.title: Water Management
water.desc: Securing sustainable water sources and developing irrigation networks to ensure water security.

energy.title: Renewable Energy
energy.desc: Investing in solar and wind energy to operate public facilities and wells.

industry.title: Industrial Development
industry.desc: Supporting productive projects and small facilities to boost the local economy.

cta.description: Your contribution today means a sustainable future for the coming generations in the land of Sweida.

vision.quote_main: We don’t just build temporary projects; we design a sustainable legacy that redefines the essence of giving in Sweida.
vision.board_msg: BOARD OF DIRECTORS - SWEIDA SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT FUND
